pages.text: $(italic)Map Atlases$() — the coordinate-true map you carry in hand. Hold it for a corner minimap; it stitches real cartographer's maps together as you explore. Press $(bold)N$() to open the minimap.$(br2)The full walkthrough is in $(l:4_wayfaring/map_atlases)Wayfaring & Maps$().$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() see $(italic)EMI$() — a book bound with the map-making basics.
pages.title: Map Atlas
